item.title: Novenas you can start today - 28 June
item.description:
Blessed Bodard Of Poitiers
Blessed Francisco Polvorinos Gomez
Blessed Joseph Juge De Saint Martin
Blessed Juan Antonio Perez Mayo
Blessed Juan Pedro Del Cotillo Fernandez
Blessed Justo Gonzalez Lorente
Blessed Manuel Gutierrez Martin
Blessed Maria Del Consuelo Raminan Carracedo
Blessed Maria Romero Meneses
Blessed Marie Gabrielle Francoise Suzanne De Gaillard De Lavaldene
Blessed Oddino Barrotti
Blessed Pascual Alaez Medina
Blessed Peter To Rot
Blessed Pope Benedict XI
Blessed Ralph Milner
Martyrs Of Durres
Saint Alexander
Saint Angelelmus Of Auxerre
Saint Antonino Fantosati
Saint Apollonius Of Brescia
Saint Bonitus Of Monte Cassino
Saint Carissima Of Rauzeille
Saint Eoaldus Of Vienne
Saint Ethelburga Of Faremoutier
Saint Hedda Of Wessex
Saint Hesychius
Saint Maelruan
Saint Marcus Ji Tianxiang
Saint Medran
Saint Merryn
Saint Odo Of Urgell
Saint Odran
Saint Pantaenus Of Alexandria
Saint Partinimus
Saint Prosper Of Aquitaine
Saint Syrus Of Genoa
Saint They
Saint Willibald Of Eichstatt

Feast Day: 7 July
Start Date: 28 June
End Date: 06 July
